privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the OrientDB database 'demodb' with credentials root/GymAnything123!. A new edge class 'PostedReview' must be created with properties Rating, Comment, and ReviewDate, migrating data from an existing intermediate Reviews vertex. The spot check verifies that user John Smith's 4-star review of Hotel Artemide is correctly migrated. All test data is synthetic, generated by Python seeding scripts that create hardcoded hotel and profile records.
